zus-fried-apple-pies.name: Zu's Fried Apple Pies
instructions: Place apples into a saucepan with sugar and cinnamon, and bring to a simmer over low heat. Cook apples, stirring frequently, until soft, about 10 minutes; mash apples with a fork to form a chunky applesauce. Set the apple filling aside.

Whisk flour and salt together in a bowl; cut in shortening with a pastry cutter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Stir in water until the dough is moistened, and knead several times just until dough holds together. Place dough onto a floured surface, pat into a round, and roll out 1/8-inch thick. Use a large round cookie cutter (4 inches in diameter) to cut the dough into 8 rounds.

Place a heaping tablespoon of apple filling onto the center of a dough round, and use your finger to moisten the edge of the crust with cold water. Fold the dough over the filling, and crimp the edges with a fork to make a half-moon-shaped pie. Repeat with remaining dough and filling.

Pour the oil into a skillet over medium-high heat, and gently lay 2 or 3 pies into the hot oil. Fry to a golden brown color, 2 to 3 minutes per side. Drain the pies on paper towels. Sprinkle a pinch of confectioners' sugar over each pie to serve. Allow to cool for at least 10 minutes before serving.

zucchini-stuffed-with-meat-recipe-comede.name: Zucchini Stuffed With Meat, Recipe
zucchini-stuffed-with-meat-recipe-comede.original_name: Calabacines rellenos con carne, receta casera

ingredients.item: 300 gr de carne picada (si es de cerdo, mejor)

instructions: Pica los por la mitad calabacines a lo largo.
with a knife make several profound cuts at every half of the pumpkin as shown in the photo. Do cuts across and across.
Be sure the knife doesn't penetrate to the bottom because it could break the pumpkins.
Once cuts have been cut with the help of a fork, remove the pumpkins from each half of the pumpkins, again guide and I'll show you in the photo above.
The ideal thing is to get about 2 / 3 from the "flesh" from the vegetable.
Una vez listo, reserva este relleno.
He pics half an onion, tomato, pepper and garlic into small cubes. Also get pumpkin meat and paddle it with the same size as other ingredients.
Warm a frying pan with olive oil and fry garlic, onion, pepper, tomato and pumpkin.
Agrega la carne de cerdo picada y mezcla todo bien.
Give him some oregano, cumin, salt and pepper.
Let her cook for a few minutes. If this stew's too dry, give him ½ glass of water.
Baja el fuego y deja que se cocine durante unos 20 minutos.
Check the salt and add more if necessary. You have to watch that this cooking doesn't get too dry. But an eye isn't about to make a soup.
While you're waiting for the meat to be ready, put the pumpkin half into the oven at 180 degrees for 10 minutes to cook them a little.
Luego de estos 10 minutos, saca los calabacines pero deja el horno encendido.

At what's ready with the stew, you can start assembling every stuffed pumpkins: simply with a spoon, get his meat minced onto every half of pumpkins, and put some broken white cheese and sprinkle parmesan cheese onto them.
Pon los calabacines al horno nuevamente, esta vez a 200 grados, en la misma bandeja que usaste previamente.
Deja que se cocinen hasta que se hayan dorado por encima tal como se ve en la foto.
